# Figure description: Условные_обозначения.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/plan_data/Условные_обозначения.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **legend sheet (условные обозначения к геологическим картам)** — a comprehensive reference legend/key for geological maps. It is not itself a map but rather the standardized symbol and notation guide accompanying the geological mapping series. The document is labeled **Чертёж XI** (Drawing/Figure XI) in the upper right corner.

---

## Coverage and Subject

This legend sheet covers the full range of stratigraphic, lithological, structural, and drilling symbols used across the **1:200,000-scale geological maps of map sheets M-42 and N-42** (northern Kazakhstan). It encompasses:

- The complete **stratigraphic column** from Precambrian/Proterozoic through Quaternary
- **Igneous rock classifications** (intrusive and volcanic)
- **Structural/tectonic symbols** (faults, unconformities)
- **Borehole/drilling symbols**
- A **geological age correlation table** (upper right) spanning Caledonian through Late Cenozoic orogenic cycles

---

## Key Content

The legend is organized into multiple thematic sections:

### 1. Stratigraphic/Lithological Units (left and center columns)
Organized from youngest (top) to oldest (bottom), with colored rectangular swatches and alphanumeric index codes. Units include:

- **Quaternary (Q):** Alluvial, lacustrine, eluvial, colluvial deposits; subdivided into Q₁–Q₄
- **Neogene–Paleogene (N, Pg):** Continental clastic sequences
- **Cretaceous (K):** Sandy-clayey continental sequences
- **Jurassic (J):** Coal-bearing and clastic sequences
- **Triassic (T):** Red-bed sequences
- **Permian (P):** Volcanic and sedimentary sequences
- **Carboniferous (C):** Carbonate and clastic sequences, subdivided into lower/middle/upper
- **Devonian (D):** Carbonate-terrigenous and volcanic sequences
- **Silurian (S):** Graptolitic shales, limestones, aleurolites
- **Ordovician (O):** Terrigenous-carbonate sequences
- **Cambrian (Cm):** Volcanogenic-sedimentary sequences
- **Precambrian/Proterozoic (PR, AR):** Metamorphic complexes, crystalline schists, gneisses, marbles

Each unit has a **colored swatch** (presumably in the original color version) and a **brief lithological description** in Russian.

### 2. Stratigraphic Boundaries (center-right section, labeled "Стратиграфические границы")
Symbols include:
- **Достоверные** (confirmed/reliable boundaries) — solid lines
- **Предполагаемые** (inferred) — dashed lines
- **Предполагаемые под покровом** (inferred under cover) — dotted lines
- **Границы фациальных замещений** (facies transition boundaries)

### 3. Разрывные нарушения (Faults/Tectonic Dislocations)
- **Главные и уходящие в фундамент** (major faults extending into basement) — thick solid lines with directional symbols
- **То же, предполагаемые по геофизическим данным** (same, inferred from geophysical data) — dashed
- **То же, предполагаемые под слоем молодых отложений** (inferred under young sediment cover)
- **Взбросо-надвиги** (thrust faults) — with teeth symbols
- **Пласты известняков, прослеженные и откартированные по контактной печати** (limestone beds traced by contact printing)

### 4. Igneous Rock Symbols (right-center section)
A detailed sub-legend for intrusive and volcanic rocks organized by composition:
- **Пласты алевролитов, насыщенных нарколитными концентрациями** (aleurolite beds with narcolithic concentrations)
- **"Порфировидные"** ("porphyritic" types)
- **"Криптопорфировидные"** ("cryptoporphyritic" types)
- **Пластовые известняки с мелкими кремнями** (bedded limestones with small cherts)
- **Пачки алевролитов:** subdivided into **Краснецветных** (red-colored) and **Зеленоцветных** (green-colored)
- **Залежи конгломератов и гравелитов:** red/green-colored varieties
- **Пласты вулканогенно-звездочных пород** (volcanogenic-starred rock beds)
- **Пласты туфов** (tuff beds)
- **Граниты средне- и крупнозернистые** (medium- to coarse-grained granites)
- **Граниты мелкозернистые** (fine-grained granites)
- **Грейзены** (greisens)
- **Диориты** (diorites)
- **Гранодиориты** (granodiorites)
- **Напряженные сиениты** (strained syenites)
- **Монциониты, кварцевые диориты** (monzonites, quartz diorites)
- **Дайки низкого состава / среднего и основного состава** (dykes of felsic/intermediate/mafic composition)
- **Вторичные изменения пород:** (Secondary rock alterations)
  - **Грейзенизация** (greisenization)
  - **Скарнирование** (skarnification)
  - **Ороговикование** (hornfelsing)

### 5. Genetic Types of Quaternary Deposits (far right column, top)
Small pattern symbols for:
- **Речное** (fluvial)
- **Озерное** (lacustrine)
- **Делюв
